patterns.name: App Shell Store Injection Ripple Effect
patterns.description: When a store is injected into app root, all tests fail until the store is mocked in TestBed
patterns.fix_pattern: Add store mock to TestBed.configureTestingModule providers
patterns.prevention: Consider lazy-loading stores instead of root injection

patterns.name: SSR Hydration: Browser State Divergence
patterns.description: Store state differs between server (no browser APIs) and client (has localStorage), causing hydration mismatch
patterns.fix_pattern: Use withHooks onInit to sync browser state after SSR hydration
patterns.prevention: Document browser-only signals; use withHooks systematically for browser APIs

patterns.name: Edit Tool Replace String Collisions
patterns.description: Short search strings in replace_all match unintended locations in import paths and names
patterns.fix_pattern: Use more specific search patterns; review diff after replace
patterns.prevention: Always include context (module name, scope) in search string

patterns.name: Angular Testing Framework API Mismatch
patterns.description: Jest and Vitest have different APIs (jest.fn vs vitest.fn, $localize setup)
patterns.fix_pattern: Check project.json test config; use framework-specific APIs
patterns.prevention: Maintain separate test setup patterns per framework

patterns.name: Blog hreflang with Different Language Slugs
patterns.description: hreflang alternates point to non-existent routes when blog slugs differ per language
patterns.fix_pattern: Exclude blog routes from hreflang; only add for parallel structure
patterns.prevention: Only use hreflang for routes with identical URL structure across languages

patterns.name: AI Review False Positives on German Typography
patterns.description: AI reviewers flag German quotation marks and dashes as unusual
patterns.fix_pattern: Expected for German XLIFF; can be dismissed
patterns.prevention: Document that German typography is intentional localization

Edit+Bash.description: Edit tool for file changes, followed by Bash to verify/test

Bash+Read.description: Run commands, then read output or related files

Read+Grep.description: Search for pattern, then read related files

recurring_issues.issue: Test setup errors when dependencies change
solutions: Always update TestBed mocks when injecting new stores/services
Use withHooks onInit for localStorage/window access
Test SSR builds locally before deployment
Only use hreflang for parallel routes
Keep blog slugs synchronized across languages (or disable hreflang)
